---
title: "Extreme Temperature Impact"
output: html_document
date: "2024-09-25"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(lattice)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggcorrplot)
library(colorspace)
library(corrplot)
library(ggstatsplot)
library(ggpubr)
library(sf)
library(spdep)
library(terra)
library(dlnm)
library(glmmTMB)
library(metafor)
library(meta)
library(mgcv)
library(splines)
library(ggdendro)
```

```{r}
full_dataset <- read.csv("../Data/Japan Data (ap exclu. outliers).csv")
full_dataset <- full_dataset %>% as.data.frame()
```

```{r}
geo_location <- read.csv("../Data/Japan LonLat.csv")
colnames(geo_location)[1] <- "NAME_1"
Japan.shapefile <- st_read('../Data/Japan_shp/JPN_adm1.shp')
Japan.shapefile <- sp::merge(Japan.shapefile,geo_location,by="NAME_1",duplicateGeoms = TRUE) %>% st_as_sf()
```

```{r}
nb_rook <- poly2nb(Japan.shapefile,queen = FALSE,row.names = Japan.shapefile$NAME_1) 
coords <-  st_coordinates(Japan.shapefile)
listw <- nb2listw(nb_rook,zero.policy = TRUE)
```

```{r}
matrix_list <- listw2mat(w_mat_d_p2)
colnames(matrix_list) <- Japan.shapefile$NAME_1
rownames(matrix_list) <- colnames(matrix_list)
matrix_list %>% as.data.frame()
```

```{r}
prefecture_list <- unique(full_dataset$NAME_1)
prefecture_list
```

```{r}
full_dataset <- full_dataset %>% dplyr::mutate(joint_p975_p95_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p975_pm25_p95_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p975_p90_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p975_pm25_p90_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p975_p80_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p975_pm25_p80_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p975_p70_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p975_pm25_p70_2d>0,1,0),
                                        
                                        joint_p95_p95_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p95_pm25_p95_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p95_p90_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p95_pm25_p90_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p95_p80_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p95_pm25_p80_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p95_p70_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p95_pm25_p70_2d>0,1,0),
                                        
                                        joint_p925_p95_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p925_pm25_p95_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p925_p90_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p925_pm25_p90_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p925_p80_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p925_pm25_p80_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p925_p70_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p925_pm25_p70_2d>0,1,0),
                                        
                                        joint_p90_p95_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p90_pm25_p95_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p90_p90_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p90_pm25_p90_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p90_p80_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p90_pm25_p80_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p90_p70_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p90_pm25_p70_2d>0,1,0))
```

```{r}
heat_joint_data <- full_dataset %>% group_by(NAME_1) %>% summarize(joint_p975_p95_2d=sum(joint_p975_p95_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p975_p90_2d=sum(joint_p975_p90_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p975_p80_2d=sum(joint_p975_p80_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p975_p70_2d=sum(joint_p975_p70_2d_binary),
                                                                   
                                                                   joint_p95_p95_2d=sum(joint_p95_p95_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p95_p90_2d=sum(joint_p95_p90_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p95_p80_2d=sum(joint_p95_p80_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p95_p70_2d=sum(joint_p95_p70_2d_binary),
                                                                   
                                                                   joint_p925_p95_2d=sum(joint_p925_p95_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p925_p90_2d=sum(joint_p925_p90_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p925_p80_2d=sum(joint_p925_p80_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p925_p70_2d=sum(joint_p925_p70_2d_binary),
                                                                   
                                                                   joint_p90_p95_2d=sum(joint_p90_p95_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p90_p90_2d=sum(joint_p90_p90_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p90_p80_2d=sum(joint_p90_p80_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p90_p70_2d=sum(joint_p90_p70_2d_binary))

heat_joint_data
```

## Interaction: PM2.5 and heat waves

```{r}
region_list <- heat_joint_data[(heat_joint_data$joint_p975_p90_2d>=1)&(heat_joint_data$joint_p95_p90_2d>=1),"NAME_1"]
region_list <- unlist(region_list)
length(region_list)
```

```{r}
heat_joint_data[(heat_joint_data$joint_p975_p90_2d<1)&(heat_joint_data$joint_p95_p90_2d<1),"NAME_1"]
region_list <- heat_joint_data[heat_joint_data$joint_p95_p90_2d>=1,"NAME_1"]
region_list <- unlist(region_list)
length(region_list)
```

## Interaction model

```{r}
for (i in 1:length(region_list)){
  region_data <- full_dataset[full_dataset$NAME_1==region_list[i],]
  neighbours_id <- which(colnames(matrix_list)==region_list[i])
  neighbours_weight <- matrix_list[,neighbours_id]
  neighbours_weight <- neighbours_weight[neighbours_weight>0]
  neighbour_data <- matrix(NA,ncol=length(neighbours_weight),nrow=nrow(region_data))
  
  if (length(neighbours_weight)>=1){
    for (j in 1:length(neighbours_weight)){
      neighbour_data[,j] <- full_dataset[full_dataset$NAME_1==names(neighbours_weight)[j],"Cases"]*neighbours_weight[j]
    }
    colnames(neighbour_data) <- paste0("neighbour",seq(1:length(neighbours_weight)))
    region_data <- cbind(region_data,neighbour_data)
  }
  else{
    region_data <- region_data
  }
  region_data2 <- region_data
  colnames(region_data2) <- colnames(region_data)
  region_data2$Year <- as.numeric(region_data2$Year)
  region_data2$Week <- as.numeric(region_data2$week)
  region_data2$Pop <- as.numeric(region_data2$Population)
  region_data2$Case <- region_data2$`Cases`
  
  cb.interaction_p95_p90_2d <- crossbasis(region_data2$joint_p95_pm25_p90_2d,lag=3,argvar=list(fun="lin"),arglag=list(fun="ns",df=2))
  cb.interaction_p95_p80_2d <- crossbasis(region_data2$joint_p95_pm25_p80_2d,lag=3,argvar=list(fun="lin"),arglag=list(fun="ns",df=2))
  cb.interaction_p95_p70_2d <- crossbasis(region_data2$joint_p95_pm25_p70_2d,lag=3,argvar=list(fun="lin"),arglag=list(fun="ns",df=2))
    
  cb.interaction_p925_p90_2d <- crossbasis(region_data2$joint_p925_pm25_p90_2d,lag=3,argvar=list(fun="lin"),arglag=list(fun="ns",df=2))
  cb.interaction_p925_p80_2d <- crossbasis(region_data2$joint_p925_pm25_p80_2d,lag=3,argvar=list(fun="lin"),arglag=list(fun="ns",df=2))
  cb.interaction_p925_p70_2d <- crossbasis(region_data2$joint_p925_pm25_p70_2d,lag=3,argvar=list(fun="lin"),arglag=list(fun="ns",df=2))
  
  cb.interaction_p90_p90_2d <- crossbasis(region_data2$joint_p90_pm25_p90_2d,lag=3,argvar=list(fun="lin"),arglag=list(fun="ns",df=2))
  cb.interaction_p90_p80_2d <- crossbasis(region_data2$joint_p90_pm25_p80_2d,lag=3,argvar=list(fun="lin"),arglag=list(fun="ns",df=2))
  cb.interaction_p90_p70_2d <- crossbasis(region_data2$joint_p90_pm25_p70_2d,lag=3,argvar=list(fun="lin"),arglag=list(fun="ns",df=2))
  
  if(length(neighbours_weight)>=1){
    neighbour_list <- paste0("ns(neighbour",seq(1:length(neighbours_weight)),")")
    neighbour_list <- paste(neighbour_list, collapse = " + ")
    
    uni_st_interaction_p95_pm25_p90_2d_model <- gam(as.formula(paste("Case ~",neighbour_list,"+ s(Week) + ns(TAVG,df=3) + ns(relative.humidity,df=3) +
                                                                     ns(wind.speed,df=3) + ns(PM25,df=3)+ns(PRCP,df=3)+cb.interaction_p95_p90_2d")),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    uni_st_interaction_p95_pm25_p80_2d_model <- gam(as.formula(paste("Case ~",neighbour_list,"+ s(Week) + ns(TAVG,df=3) + ns(relative.humidity,df=3) +
                                                                     ns(wind.speed,df=3) + ns(PM25,df=3)+ns(PRCP,df=3)+cb.interaction_p95_p80_2d")),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    uni_st_interaction_p95_pm25_p70_2d_model <- gam(as.formula(paste("Case ~",neighbour_list,"+ s(Week) + ns(TAVG,df=3) + ns(relative.humidity,df=3) +
                                                                     ns(wind.speed,df=3) + ns(PM25,df=3)+ns(PRCP,df=3)+cb.interaction_p95_p70_2d")),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    
    uni_st_interaction_p925_pm25_p90_2d_model <- gam(as.formula(paste("Case ~",neighbour_list,"+ s(Week) + ns(TAVG,df=3) + ns(relative.humidity,df=3) +
                                                                     ns(wind.speed,df=3) + ns(PM25,df=3)+ns(PRCP,df=3)+cb.interaction_p925_p90_2d")),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    uni_st_interaction_p925_pm25_p80_2d_model <- gam(as.formula(paste("Case ~",neighbour_list,"+ s(Week) + ns(TAVG,df=3) + ns(relative.humidity,df=3) +
                                                                     ns(wind.speed,df=3) + ns(PM25,df=3)+ns(PRCP,df=3)+cb.interaction_p925_p80_2d")),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    uni_st_interaction_p925_pm25_p70_2d_model <- gam(as.formula(paste("Case ~",neighbour_list,"+ s(Week) + ns(TAVG,df=3) + ns(relative.humidity,df=3) +
                                                                     ns(wind.speed,df=3) + ns(PM25,df=3)+ns(PRCP,df=3)+cb.interaction_p925_p70_2d")),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    
    uni_st_interaction_p90_pm25_p90_2d_model <- gam(as.formula(paste("Case ~",neighbour_list,"+ s(Week) + ns(TAVG,df=3) + ns(relative.humidity,df=3) +
                                                                     ns(wind.speed,df=3) + ns(PM25,df=3)+ns(PRCP,df=3)+cb.interaction_p90_p90_2d")),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    uni_st_interaction_p90_pm25_p80_2d_model <- gam(as.formula(paste("Case ~",neighbour_list,"+ s(Week) + ns(TAVG,df=3) + ns(relative.humidity,df=3) +
                                                                     ns(wind.speed,df=3) + ns(PM25,df=3)+ns(PRCP,df=3)+cb.interaction_p90_p80_2d")),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    uni_st_interaction_p90_pm25_p70_2d_model <- gam(as.formula(paste("Case ~",neighbour_list,"+ s(Week) + ns(TAVG,df=3) + ns(relative.humidity,df=3) +
                                                                     ns(wind.speed,df=3) + ns(PM25,df=3)+ns(PRCP,df=3)+cb.interaction_p90_p70_2d")),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
  }
  else{
    uni_st_interaction_p95_pm25_p90_2d_model <- gam(Case~cb.interaction_p95_p90_2d+s(Week)+ns(TAVG,df=3)+ns(relative.humidity,df=3)+ns(wind.speed,df=3)+
                                                ns(PM25,df=3)+ns(PRCP,df=3),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    uni_st_interaction_p95_pm25_p80_2d_model <- gam(Case~cb.interaction_p95_p80_2d+s(Week)+ns(TAVG,df=3)+ns(relative.humidity,df=3)+ns(wind.speed,df=3)+
                                                ns(PM25,df=3)+ns(PRCP,df=3),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    uni_st_interaction_p95_pm25_p70_2d_model <- gam(Case~cb.interaction_p95_p70_2d+s(Week)+ns(TAVG,df=3)+ns(relative.humidity,df=3)+ns(wind.speed,df=3)+
                                                ns(PM25,df=3)+ns(PRCP,df=3),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)

    
    uni_st_interaction_p925_pm25_p90_2d_model <- gam(Case~cb.interaction_p925_p90_2d+s(Week)+ns(TAVG,df=3)+ns(relative.humidity,df=3)+ns(wind.speed,df=3)+
                                                ns(PM25,df=3)+ns(PRCP,df=3),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    uni_st_interaction_p925_pm25_p80_2d_model <- gam(Case~cb.interaction_p925_p80_2d+s(Week)+ns(TAVG,df=3)+ns(relative.humidity,df=3)+ns(wind.speed,df=3)+
                                                ns(PM25,df=3)+ns(PRCP,df=3),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    uni_st_interaction_p925_pm25_p70_2d_model <- gam(Case~cb.interaction_p925_p70_2d+s(Week)+ns(TAVG,df=3)+ns(relative.humidity,df=3)+ns(wind.speed,df=3)+
                                                ns(PM25,df=3)+ns(PRCP,df=3),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    
    uni_st_interaction_p90_pm25_p90_2d_model <- gam(Case~cb.interaction_p90_p90_2d+s(Week)+ns(TAVG,df=3)+ns(relative.humidity,df=3)+ns(wind.speed,df=3)+
                                                ns(PM25,df=3)+ns(PRCP,df=3),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    uni_st_interaction_p90_pm25_p80_2d_model <- gam(Case~cb.interaction_p90_p80_2d+s(Week)+ns(TAVG,df=3)+ns(relative.humidity,df=3)+ns(wind.speed,df=3)+
                                                ns(PM25,df=3)+ns(PRCP,df=3),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    uni_st_interaction_p90_pm25_p70_2d_model <- gam(Case~cb.interaction_p90_p70_2d+s(Week)+ns(TAVG,df=3)+ns(relative.humidity,df=3)+ns(wind.speed,df=3)+
                                                ns(PM25,df=3)+ns(PRCP,df=3),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)

  }
  joint_p95_p90_2d <- crosspred(cb.interaction_p95_p90_2d,uni_st_interaction_p95_pm25_p90_2d_model,cen=0,cumul=TRUE,by=1)
  joint_p95_p80_2d <- crosspred(cb.interaction_p95_p80_2d,uni_st_interaction_p95_pm25_p80_2d_model,cen=0,cumul=TRUE,by=1)
  joint_p95_p70_2d <- crosspred(cb.interaction_p95_p70_2d,uni_st_interaction_p95_pm25_p70_2d_model,cen=0,cumul=TRUE,by=1)
  
  joint_p925_p90_2d <- crosspred(cb.interaction_p925_p90_2d,uni_st_interaction_p925_pm25_p90_2d_model,cen=0,cumul=TRUE,by=1)
  joint_p925_p80_2d <- crosspred(cb.interaction_p925_p80_2d,uni_st_interaction_p925_pm25_p80_2d_model,cen=0,cumul=TRUE,by=1)
  joint_p925_p70_2d <- crosspred(cb.interaction_p925_p70_2d,uni_st_interaction_p925_pm25_p70_2d_model,cen=0,cumul=TRUE,by=1)
  
  joint_p90_p90_2d <- crosspred(cb.interaction_p90_p90_2d,uni_st_interaction_p90_pm25_p90_2d_model,cen=0,cumul=TRUE,by=1)
  joint_p90_p80_2d <- crosspred(cb.interaction_p90_p80_2d,uni_st_interaction_p90_pm25_p80_2d_model,cen=0,cumul=TRUE,by=1)
  joint_p90_p70_2d <- crosspred(cb.interaction_p90_p70_2d,uni_st_interaction_p90_pm25_p70_2d_model,cen=0,cumul=TRUE,by=1)
}
```

## RERI

```{r}
full_dataset <- full_dataset %>% mutate(joint_p975_p95_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p975_pm25_p95_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p975_p90_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p975_pm25_p90_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p975_p80_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p975_pm25_p80_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p975_p70_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p975_pm25_p70_2d>0,1,0),
                                        
                                        joint_p95_p95_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p95_pm25_p95_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p95_p90_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p95_pm25_p90_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p95_p80_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p95_pm25_p80_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p95_p70_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p95_pm25_p70_2d>0,1,0),
                                        
                                        joint_p925_p95_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p925_pm25_p95_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p925_p90_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p925_pm25_p90_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p925_p80_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p925_pm25_p80_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p925_p70_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p925_pm25_p70_2d>0,1,0),
                                        
                                        joint_p90_p95_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p90_pm25_p95_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p90_p90_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p90_pm25_p90_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p90_p80_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p90_pm25_p80_2d>0,1,0),
                                        joint_p90_p70_2d_binary=ifelse(joint_p90_pm25_p70_2d>0,1,0))
```

```{r}
heat_joint_data <- full_dataset %>% group_by(NAME_1) %>% summarize(joint_p975_p95_2d=sum(joint_p975_p95_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p975_p90_2d=sum(joint_p975_p90_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p975_p80_2d=sum(joint_p975_p80_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p975_p70_2d=sum(joint_p975_p70_2d_binary),
                                                                   
                                                                   joint_p95_p95_2d=sum(joint_p95_p95_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p95_p90_2d=sum(joint_p95_p90_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p95_p80_2d=sum(joint_p95_p80_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p95_p70_2d=sum(joint_p95_p70_2d_binary),
                                                                   
                                                                   joint_p925_p95_2d=sum(joint_p925_p95_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p925_p90_2d=sum(joint_p925_p90_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p925_p80_2d=sum(joint_p925_p80_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p925_p70_2d=sum(joint_p925_p70_2d_binary),
                                                                   
                                                                   joint_p90_p95_2d=sum(joint_p90_p95_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p90_p90_2d=sum(joint_p90_p90_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p90_p80_2d=sum(joint_p90_p80_2d_binary),
                                                                   joint_p90_p70_2d=sum(joint_p90_p70_2d_binary))
```

```{r}
region_list <- heat_joint_data[heat_joint_data$joint_p95_p90_2d>=1,"NAME_1"]
region_list <- unlist(region_list)
length(region_list)
```

```{r}
calculate_RERI_metrics <- function(interaction_model,factor1,factor2,interaction){
  result = summary(interaction_model)
  RERI_interaction = (exp(coef(interaction_model)[interaction])-1)-
    (exp(coef(interaction_model)[factor1])-1)-(exp(coef(interaction_model)[factor2])-1)
  h1 = -exp(coef(interaction_model)[factor1])
  h2 = -exp(coef(interaction_model)[factor2])
  h3 = exp(coef(interaction_model)[interaction])
  sigma13 = vcov(interaction_model)[factor1,interaction]
  sigma23 = vcov(interaction_model)[factor2,interaction]
  sigma12 = vcov(interaction_model)[factor1,factor2]
  sigma1 = result$se[factor1]
  sigma2 = result$se[factor2]
  sigma3 = result$se[interaction]
  var = (h1)^2*(sigma1)^2+(h2)^2*(sigma2)^2+(h3)^2*(sigma3)^2+2*h1*h3*sigma13+2*h1*h2*sigma12+2*h2*h3*sigma23
  se = sqrt(var)
  return(c(RERI_interaction,se,RERI_interaction-1.96*se,RERI_interaction+1.96*se))
}
```

```{r}
RERI_matrix_p95_p90_2d <- matrix(NA,ncol=4,nrow=length(region_list))
RERI_matrix_p95_p80_2d <- matrix(NA,ncol=4,nrow=length(region_list))
RERI_matrix_p95_p70_2d <- matrix(NA,ncol=4,nrow=length(region_list))

RERI_matrix_p925_p90_2d <- matrix(NA,ncol=4,nrow=length(region_list))
RERI_matrix_p925_p80_2d <- matrix(NA,ncol=4,nrow=length(region_list))
RERI_matrix_p925_p70_2d <- matrix(NA,ncol=4,nrow=length(region_list))

RERI_matrix_p90_p90_2d <- matrix(NA,ncol=4,nrow=length(region_list))
RERI_matrix_p90_p80_2d <- matrix(NA,ncol=4,nrow=length(region_list))
RERI_matrix_p90_p70_2d <- matrix(NA,ncol=4,nrow=length(region_list))

for (i in 1:length(region_list)){
  region_data <- full_dataset[full_dataset$NAME_1==region_list[i],]
  neighbours_id <- which(colnames(matrix_list)==region_list[i])
  neighbours_weight <- matrix_list[,neighbours_id]
  neighbours_weight <- neighbours_weight[neighbours_weight>0]
  neighbour_data <- matrix(NA,ncol=length(neighbours_weight),nrow=nrow(region_data))
  
  if (length(neighbours_weight)>=1){
    for (j in 1:length(neighbours_weight)){
      neighbour_data[,j] <- full_dataset[full_dataset$NAME_1==names(neighbours_weight)[j],"Cases"]*neighbours_weight[j]
    }
    colnames(neighbour_data) <- paste0("neighbour",seq(1:length(neighbours_weight)))
    region_data <- cbind(region_data,neighbour_data)
  }
  else{
    region_data <- region_data
  }
  region_data2 <- region_data
  colnames(region_data2) <- colnames(region_data)
  region_data2$Year <- as.numeric(region_data2$Year)
  region_data2$Week <- as.numeric(region_data2$week)
  region_data2$Pop <- as.numeric(region_data2$Population)
  region_data2$Case <- region_data2$`Cases`
  
  region_data2 <- region_data2 %>% mutate(excess_pm25_p90_2d_binary=ifelse(excess_pm25_p90_2d>0,1,0),
                                          excess_pm25_p80_2d_binary=ifelse(excess_pm25_p80_2d>0,1,0),
                                          excess_pm25_p70_2d_binary=ifelse(excess_pm25_p70_2d>0,1,0))
  
  if(length(neighbours_weight)>=1){
    neighbour_list <- paste0("ns(neighbour",seq(1:length(neighbours_weight)),")")
    neighbour_list <- paste(neighbour_list, collapse = " + ")

    uni_st_RERI_p95_p90_2d_model <- gam(as.formula(paste("Case ~",neighbour_list,"+ s(Week) + ns(TAVG,df=3) + ns(relative.humidity,df=3) + ns(PRCP,df=3)+
    ns(wind.speed,df=3) + ns(PM25,df=3)+joint_p95_p90_2d_binary+excess_pm25_p90_2d_binary+p95_2d_binary")),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    uni_st_RERI_p95_p80_2d_model <- gam(as.formula(paste("Case ~",neighbour_list,"+ s(Week) + ns(TAVG,df=3) + ns(relative.humidity,df=3) + ns(PRCP,df=3)+
    ns(wind.speed,df=3) + ns(PM25,df=3)+ joint_p95_p80_2d_binary+excess_pm25_p80_2d_binary+p95_2d_binary")),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
        
    uni_st_RERI_p95_p70_2d_model <- gam(as.formula(paste("Case ~",neighbour_list,"+s(Week) + ns(TAVG,df=3) + ns(relative.humidity,df=3) + ns(PRCP,df=3)+
    ns(wind.speed,df=3) + ns(PM25,df=3)+joint_p95_p70_2d_binary+excess_pm25_p70_2d_binary+p95_2d_binary")),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    uni_st_RERI_p925_p90_2d_model <- gam(as.formula(paste("Case ~",neighbour_list,"+ s(Week) + ns(TAVG,df=3) + ns(relative.humidity,df=3) + ns(PRCP,df=3)+
    ns(wind.speed,df=3) + ns(PM25,df=3)+joint_p925_p90_2d_binary+excess_pm25_p90_2d_binary+p92.5_2d_binary")),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    uni_st_RERI_p925_p80_2d_model <- gam(as.formula(paste("Case ~",neighbour_list,"+ s(Week) + ns(TAVG,df=3) + ns(relative.humidity,df=3) + ns(PRCP,df=3)+
    ns(wind.speed,df=3) + ns(PM25,df=3)+ joint_p925_p80_2d_binary+excess_pm25_p80_2d_binary+p92.5_2d_binary")),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
        
    uni_st_RERI_p925_p70_2d_model <- gam(as.formula(paste("Case ~",neighbour_list,"+s(Week) + ns(TAVG,df=3) + ns(relative.humidity,df=3) + ns(PRCP,df=3)+
    ns(wind.speed,df=3) + ns(PM25,df=3)+joint_p925_p70_2d_binary+excess_pm25_p70_2d_binary+p92.5_2d_binary")),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    
    uni_st_RERI_p90_p90_2d_model <- gam(as.formula(paste("Case ~",neighbour_list,"+ s(Week) + ns(TAVG,df=3) + ns(relative.humidity,df=3) + ns(PRCP,df=3)+
    ns(wind.speed,df=3) + ns(PM25,df=3)+joint_p90_p90_2d_binary+excess_pm25_p90_2d_binary+p90_2d_binary")),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    uni_st_RERI_p90_p80_2d_model <- gam(as.formula(paste("Case ~",neighbour_list,"+ s(Week) + ns(TAVG,df=3) + ns(relative.humidity,df=3) + ns(PRCP,df=3)+
    ns(wind.speed,df=3) + ns(PM25,df=3)+ joint_p90_p80_2d_binary+excess_pm25_p80_2d_binary+p90_2d_binary")),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
        
    uni_st_RERI_p90_p70_2d_model <- gam(as.formula(paste("Case ~",neighbour_list,"+s(Week) + ns(TAVG,df=3) + ns(relative.humidity,df=3) + ns(PRCP,df=3)+
    ns(wind.speed,df=3) + ns(PM25,df=3)+joint_p90_p70_2d_binary+excess_pm25_p70_2d_binary+p90_2d_binary")),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
  }
  else{

    uni_st_RERI_p95_p90_2d_model <- gam(Case~joint_p95_p90_2d_binary+excess_pm25_p90_2d_binary+p95_2d_binary+ns(PRCP,df=3)+
                                                 s(Week)+ns(TAVG,df=3)+ns(relative.humidity,df=3)+ns(wind.speed,df=3)+ns(PM25,df=3),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)

    uni_st_RERI_p95_p80_2d_model <- gam(Case~joint_p95_p80_2d_binary+excess_pm25_p80_2d_binary+p95_2d_binary+ns(PRCP,df=3)+
                                                 s(Week)+ns(TAVG,df=3)+ns(relative.humidity,df=3)+ns(wind.speed,df=3)+ns(PM25,df=3),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    uni_st_RERI_p95_p70_2d_model <- gam(Case~joint_p95_p70_2d_binary+excess_pm25_p70_2d_binary+p95_2d_binary+ns(PRCP,df=3)+
                                                 s(Week)+ns(TAVG,df=3)+ns(relative.humidity,df=3)+ns(wind.speed,df=3)+ns(PM25,df=3),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    
    uni_st_RERI_p925_p90_2d_model <- gam(Case~joint_p925_p90_2d_binary+excess_pm25_p90_2d_binary+p92.5_2d_binary+ns(PRCP,df=3)+
                                                 s(Week)+ns(TAVG,df=3)+ns(relative.humidity,df=3)+ns(wind.speed,df=3)+ns(PM25,df=3),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)

    uni_st_RERI_p925_p80_2d_model <- gam(Case~joint_p925_p80_2d_binary+excess_pm25_p80_2d_binary+p92.5_2d_binary+ns(PRCP,df=3)+
                                                 s(Week)+ns(TAVG,df=3)+ns(relative.humidity,df=3)+ns(wind.speed,df=3)+ns(PM25,df=3),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    uni_st_RERI_p925_p70_2d_model <- gam(Case~joint_p925_p70_2d_binary+excess_pm25_p70_2d_binary+p92.5_2d_binary+ns(PRCP,df=3)+
                                                 s(Week)+ns(TAVG,df=3)+ns(relative.humidity,df=3)+ns(wind.speed,df=3)+ns(PM25,df=3),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    
    uni_st_RERI_p90_p90_2d_model <- gam(Case~joint_p90_p90_2d_binary+excess_pm25_p90_2d_binary+p90_2d_binary+ns(PRCP,df=3)+
                                                 s(Week)+ns(TAVG,df=3)+ns(relative.humidity,df=3)+ns(wind.speed,df=3)+ns(PM25,df=3),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)

    uni_st_RERI_p90_p80_2d_model <- gam(Case~joint_p90_p80_2d_binary+excess_pm25_p80_2d_binary+p90_2d_binary+ns(PRCP,df=3)+
                                                 s(Week)+ns(TAVG,df=3)+ns(relative.humidity,df=3)+ns(wind.speed,df=3)+ns(PM25,df=3),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
    
    uni_st_RERI_p90_p70_2d_model <- gam(Case~joint_p90_p70_2d_binary+excess_pm25_p70_2d_binary+p90_2d_binary+ns(PRCP,df=3)+
                                                 s(Week)+ns(TAVG,df=3)+ns(relative.humidity,df=3)+ns(wind.speed,df=3)+ns(PM25,df=3),
                                               offset=log(Pop),family=quasipoisson(),data=region_data2,method='REML',select=TRUE)
  }
  
  RERI_matrix_p95_p90_2d[i,] <- calculate_RERI_metrics(uni_st_RERI_p95_p90_2d_model,
                                                        "excess_pm25_p90_2d_binary","p95_2d_binary","joint_p95_p90_2d_binary")
  RERI_matrix_p95_p80_2d[i,] <- calculate_RERI_metrics(uni_st_RERI_p95_p80_2d_model,
                                                        "excess_pm25_p80_2d_binary","p95_2d_binary","joint_p95_p80_2d_binary")
  RERI_matrix_p95_p70_2d[i,] <- calculate_RERI_metrics(uni_st_RERI_p95_p70_2d_model,
                                                        "excess_pm25_p70_2d_binary","p95_2d_binary","joint_p95_p70_2d_binary")
  
  RERI_matrix_p925_p90_2d[i,] <- calculate_RERI_metrics(uni_st_RERI_p925_p90_2d_model,
                                                        "excess_pm25_p90_2d_binary","p92.5_2d_binary","joint_p925_p90_2d_binary")
  RERI_matrix_p925_p80_2d[i,] <- calculate_RERI_metrics(uni_st_RERI_p925_p80_2d_model,
                                                        "excess_pm25_p80_2d_binary","p92.5_2d_binary","joint_p925_p80_2d_binary")
  RERI_matrix_p925_p70_2d[i,] <- calculate_RERI_metrics(uni_st_RERI_p925_p70_2d_model,
                                                        "excess_pm25_p70_2d_binary","p92.5_2d_binary","joint_p925_p70_2d_binary")
  
  RERI_matrix_p90_p90_2d[i,] <- calculate_RERI_metrics(uni_st_RERI_p90_p90_2d_model,
                                                        "excess_pm25_p90_2d_binary","p90_2d_binary","joint_p90_p90_2d_binary")
  RERI_matrix_p90_p80_2d[i,] <- calculate_RERI_metrics(uni_st_RERI_p90_p80_2d_model,
                                                        "excess_pm25_p80_2d_binary","p90_2d_binary","joint_p90_p80_2d_binary")
  RERI_matrix_p90_p70_2d[i,] <- calculate_RERI_metrics(uni_st_RERI_p90_p70_2d_model,
                                                        "excess_pm25_p70_2d_binary","p90_2d_binary","joint_p90_p70_2d_binary")
}
```
